subject: [PATCH v5 00/18] userfaultfd: working set tracking for VM guest memory

reviews.author: SeongJae Park
reviews.summary:
Gave Reviewed-by

Reviewer SeongJae Park complimented the patch, stating it was a 'nice cleanup' and expressing gratitude.

2026-05-28.patch_summary: This patch series introduces working set tracking for VM guest memory using the userfaultfd (UFFD) mechanism. The first patch in the series fixes a race condition in the make_uffd_wp_huge_pte() function, which is responsible for setting the UFFD_WP bit on present HugeTLB PTEs. The fix involves mirroring the pattern used by the non-hugetlb sibling function to ensure atomicity and consistency of the update process. This patch series aims to improve memory management in VM guests by providing a more accurate view of their working set, which is essential for efficient resource allocation and optimization.
